protocol.cleanedWith: fixDataset recommended set + most-common unify + PII mask

fixes_applied: Cleared 7 placeholder dates (1900-01-01 / 0000-00-00) in "close_date" — they are missing data, not dates.
Unified 2 values in "account" to your chosen spelling ("Globex").
Unified 1 value in "region" to your chosen spelling ("apac").
Converted 9 sentinel tokens (N/A, NULL, …) in "amount_usd" to real empty cells.
skipped: Duplicate IDs in "deal_id": exact duplicate copies are removed by dedupe — if duplicates remain, the rows differ and deciding which record is the truth is your call.
Missing values in "region" left blank — imputation is a judgment, not a fact.
"amount_usd" mixes numbers and words — coercing "thirty" → 30 needs interpretation, left as-is.
